{"dg-publish":true,"permalink":"/EXAM REVIEWS/SUBJECT/Bio 11/2.7 Pedigrees/","created":"2026-03-28T21:21:40.853-04:00","updated":"2026-04-05T17:58:43.530-04:00","dg-note-properties":{}}
---

2026-03-28 21:21

Status: #new 

Tags: #genetics #biology

# Pedigrees
#### Pedigrees
- Human Breeding studies cannot be done for genetics. Hence, there necessitates a need to use pedigrees.
	- This is because we cant designate mates
	- We cannot accumulate data for statistical purposes*
- Legend:
	- ie. <svg version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 413.19970703125 289.2255948937458" width="413.19970703125" height="289.2255948937458" class="excalidraw-svg"><!-- transform="translate(10 254.22559489374578) rotate(0 196.599853515625 12.5)"><text x="0" y="17.619999999999997" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#d3d3d3" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Vertical Line connects parent to children</text></g></svg>
	- Every row represents a generation of a family, which is identifiable with a roman numeral
	- Individuals are organized from left to right with Arabic numbers
	- ie. <svg version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 546.2518111519191 386.60502102639134" width="546.2518111519191" height="386.60502102639134" class="excalidraw-svg"><!-- direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">4</text></g></svg>
- This is helpful to determine certain modes of inheritance such as:
	- Autosomal Dominant
	- Autosomal Recessive
	- Sex-linked
